declared_scope: v0.9 parent stack plus a compressed-RAM (zram) swap device. First ADDED optimization (cycle 2), not a v0.8 subset.
hypothesis: On a RAM-constrained machine, zram reduces memory pressure. NOTE: the current sensor suite does not stress memory, so this screen mainly tests safe apply/revert and non-regression; proving the benefit needs a memory-pressure sensor.
rollback_method: Preset removes only the zram device it created, then delegates to the v0.9 preset undo; harness reverts at run end.
